titles.title: He Is All Over Me and He Is Keeping Me Alive

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He is all over me and He’s keeping me alive, Keeping me alive, keeping me alive.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He is all over me and He’s keeping me alive, Jesus is keeping me alive.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The Devil doesn’t like it, but it’s keeping me alive, keeping me alive,

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Keeping me alive, It’s the Holy Ghost and Fire and it’s keeping me alive, Keeping me alive, Keeping me alive.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: It’s the Holy Ghost and fire and it’s keeping me alive, Jesus is keeping me alive
